title: Iconize (CanIconize)
text: Iconize (CanIconize) Window property that determines whether the user can minimize the form or application window at run time, and enables the Minimize/Restore button in the title bar. Value Description Default Undefined. The default value is used. True The user can minimize the window by clicking the Minimize/Restore button in the title bar or by selecting the appropriate option in the system menu. False The user cannot minimize the window. The Minimize button (if visible) is disabled. Usage Dynamic? No Dependencies: Caption and System Menu must be True . If both Maximize and Iconize properties are False , the Minimize/Restore and Maximize/Restore buttons are not displayed in the title bar. Applies To Application Shells for Desktop Applications Forms Related Links Maximize Determines whether the user can maximize and restore the size of the form or application window using the Maximize/Restore button in the title bar. Caption Window property that determines whether the form window has a title bar. Valid values: True (default) or False. System Menu (SysMenu) Window property of a form or application shell that determines whether the Windows system menu and buttons to minimize, maximize, and close the window are available for this window. Valid values: True or False. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
